strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages (TypeScript, Java, Kotlin, Python) and frameworks (Node.js, React, Nest.js)
Direct experience with AI agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP and code generators
Strong track record of building scalable systems (handling millions of requests) and optimizing performance
concerns: Limited recent work with Vitest (primary stack requirement) or React in the resume's listed recent roles
Primary backend experience leans toward Node.js/Java, with less emphasis on Nest.js in visible roles
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL/MySQL (required in primary stack) in recent project descriptions
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack engineering skills with deep expertise in scalable systems, AI tooling, and polyglot development. His background aligns well with the role's technical demands, particularly in Node.js and TypeScript, though his recent direct exposure to the primary stack (Nest.js, Vitest) is less clear. His problem-solving record, architecture contributions, and cross-domain experience make him a compelling candidate for this mid-senior role.
